name: Wild Cat Island 👣 Stripped and Stranded
description:
[Any POV/ Women's Group limitless]

A small luxury cruise ship sinks in the Caribbean. You're stranded with four women (crew member Yuna, rich wife Olivia, heiress Sophie and influencer Ava) on a Caribbean island inhabited by one or more jaguars.🐾 Paradise or hell? You'll find out.

...Reroll when JanitorAI starts talking for you...

If you'd rather be stranded in a mixed group: Wild Cat Island - Mixed Group limitless.

Limited women's group: Wild Cat Island Women's Group.
creator: Goon to
